senses.gloss: enclosure, area to keep something; pen, corral, coop; barn, byre

examples.text: وبعد قضاء بعض الوقت في حظيرة النمور للتعود على المكان الجديد، جرى جمع الاثنين ليألفا بعضهما البعض.
examples.english: After spending some time in the tiger enclosure for getting used to the new place, the two have have been gathered together so they get used to each other.

senses.gloss: enclosure, area to keep something; hangar, deck
